metadata.defaultDescription: Handcrafted jewelry and diamonds for jewelers — licensed gemology and in-house manufacturing in Germany.

footer.copyright: © {year} Rösler & Engert GbR. All rights reserved.
footer.tagline: Handcrafted jewelry and diamonds — Made in Germany.

hero.title: Handcrafted for Your Business
hero.subtitle: As a B2B partner for jewelers, we combine licensed gemology, in-house manufacturing in Germany, and generations of craftsmanship — for jewelry that delights your customers.

aboutPreview.title: Craftsmanship Across Generations
aboutPreview.text: For generations, we have crafted exclusive jewelry in Germany for discerning jewelers. Our licensed gemologists and master goldsmiths unite precision, aesthetics, and trust — from rough diamond to finished piece.

categories.title: Our Expertise
categories.subtitle: From diamond selection to finished collections — all under one roof.

expertise.title: Licensed Gemology & German Manufacturing
expertise.text: Our in-house gemologist guarantees the highest quality standards in diamond selection. In our own manufactory in Germany, handcrafted collections are created — precise, timeless, and ready for your showroom.

hero.title: Heritage Craftsmanship Across Generations
hero.subtitle: We are your B2B partner for handcrafted jewelry and diamonds — with our own manufactory in Germany and licensed gemology in-house.

heritage.title: Craft with History
heritage.text: Across generations, we have established ourselves as a manufactory for discerning jewelry. Every piece is created in our workshop in Germany — crafted by master goldsmiths who unite precision and aesthetics in every facet.

gemology.title: Licensed Gemology
gemology.text: Our in-house gemologist accompanies the entire process — from diamond selection and quality inspection to certification. This guarantees transparency and the highest standards for our partner jewelers.

manufacturing.title: In-House Manufacturing in Germany
manufacturing.text: In our manufactory, collections for earrings, rings, and necklaces are created — handcrafted, individually customizable, and ready for resale in your store.

hero.title: Handcrafted Jewelry for Jewelers
hero.subtitle: Our collections are crafted in Germany — precise, timeless, and ready for your showroom.

earrings.title: Earrings
earrings.description: From classic studs to opulent hoops — handcrafted earrings in gold and with diamonds, tailored for your collection.

rings.title: Rings
rings.description: Engagement rings, solitaires, and band rings — crafted with the highest precision and fine materials for your customers.

necklaces.title: Necklaces
necklaces.description: Pendants, collars, and chains — elegant designs that integrate seamlessly into your assortment.

hero.title: Diamonds of the Highest Quality
hero.subtitle: Our in-house gemologist selects and certifies every stone — for transparency and trust in your partnership.

expertise.title: Gemological Expertise
expertise.text: From rough stone selection to cut evaluation, our licensed gemologist accompanies the entire process. We offer a wide range of cuts and quality grades for your assortment.

hero.eyebrow: We look forward to hearing from you
hero.title: Let's talk
hero.subtitle: Whether partnership, collection, or diamond selection — our team will advise you personally.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you — we will get back to you shortly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
1. Privacy at a glance

General information
The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website.

2. Data controller
Rösler & Engert GbR
Musterstraße 1
97070 Würzburg
Email: info@roesler-engert.de

3. Data collection on this website
When you visit our website, technically necessary data (e.g. IP address, browser type) is stored in server log files.

4. Contact form
If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details will be stored for processing the request.

5. Your rights
You have the right to information, correction, deletion, and restriction of processing of your personal data.

Please have these placeholder texts reviewed and adapted by a legal professional.
